signals.headline: [Context] Will Dogecoin reach $0.16 by December 31, 2026?
signals.raw:
No definitive consensus exists on whether Dogecoin (DOGE) will reach $0.16 by December 31, 2026, as predictions vary widely from bearish short-term views around $0.12–$0.14 to highly optimistic long-term forecasts exceeding $1.[1][2][6] Prediction markets currently assign low probabilities: 34.8–37.6% "Yes" on Awebanalysis for hitting $0.16 by year-end, while Polymarket prices "↓ 0.14" at 100% for 2026 outcomes and lower odds for higher thresholds like $0.20 (28.5%).[3][7][9]

### Current Price
